svg.title: AgentOS System Architecture
svg.desc: Seven-layer architecture: API Surface, Cognitive Substrate (GMI), Memory + RAG (4-tier memory, 8 cognitive mechanisms, HyDE, GraphRAG, 7 vector backends), Tools and Capabilities, Guardrails and HITL, Orchestration, and I/O and Providers.
svg.text: Seven cooperating layers · API at the top · providers at the floor · cognition + memory + safety in the middle

g.text: High-level helpers for one-shot calls + stateful agent factories
Per-agent coordinator: persona, mood, working state, reasoning trace
100+ packs · 88 SKILL.md · judge-gated runtime tool forging
PII redaction · ML classifiers · NLI grounding · 5 approval triggers
3 authoring APIs → 1 IR · graph runtime · checkpoint + resume
Voice · channels · media · 21 LLM providers with fallback chains
